subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the Sovereign of the Kingdom of Utterance, Who sendeth down, at every moment, the pearls of proof like rain from the clouds of His bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مالک ملکوت بیانرا که در هر آن لئالی برهان بمثابه امطار از سحاب فضلش نازل
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @call to action, @praise and encouragement
